sys_script_client.description: v 2.5 P2 STRY0077947 - External Task Outbound - Information message on External Due Date Field - Task's External Due Date is greater than Task's "Suspense Date" STRY0077867 - External Task Inbound (TA is External OU) - Information message on Suspense Date Field - Top Task's External Due Date is less than Task's "Suspense Date" STRY0077847 - Information message on Subtask's Suspense Date field - Subtask's Suspense Date is after Parent Task's Suspense Date
sys_script_client.messages: Suspense Date AFTER External Due Date External Due Date is AFTER the Suspense Date
sys_script_client.name: Task - OnChange External Due Date
